title: gaming-v1
description: Gaming platform service contract v1 — 17 operations across profile, achievements, games, social, and messaging.

operations.name: profile
operations.description: Get user profile (display name, avatar, level, platform stats)

operations.name: achievements
operations.description: List achievements/trophies for a specific game with earned status

operations.name: achievement_summary
operations.description: Overall achievement/trophy completion stats (level, points, counts by tier)

operations.name: games_played
operations.description: Game library with playtime, play count, and last played dates

operations.name: games_recent
operations.description: Recently played games ordered by last session

operations.name: search_users
operations.description: Search for users by display name or online ID

operations.name: achievement_compare
operations.description: Compare achievement progress between two users for a game

operations.name: achievement_groups
operations.description: Achievement groups (base game, DLC, expansions) with completion stats

operations.name: send_message
operations.description: Send a text message to a user or group
